reasoning: A personal AI gallery app needs to feel intimate, premium, and cinematic. Dark mode allows the user's photos (memories) to be the focal point. Using subtle glowing gradients (Aura/Sunset) evokes a feeling of 'smart memory' rather than clinical data. We lean into deep obsidian spaces.

layout_spacing.surface_strategy: Glassmorphism for nav and overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Solid dark surfaces for cards. 1px border-white/10 to ground elements.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-[32px] for large floating chat bubbles

components.chat_bubble_ai: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 text-zinc-200
components.chat_bubble_user: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#FFC8A2]/20 to-[#FF8C94]/20 border border-[#FF8C94]/30 text-white rounded-3xl rounded-tr-sm p-4
components.photo_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/5 bg-zinc-900 group
components.story_cover: relative h-72 w-full overflow-hidden rounded-2xl group flex flex-col justify-end p-4
components.search_bar: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4 flex items-center backdrop-blur-2xl w-full
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 pb-8 pt-4 px-6 flex justify-around items-center z-50
components.insight_card: p-5 rounded-2xl bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden

icons.instructions: Use consistent stroke width (1.5). Apply primary gradient to active tab icons.

ai_abstract_covers.description: Neon abstract gradient for story covers
Colorful abstract gradient for insights background

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling to emulate a mobile app interface on the web viewport.
Implement the 'Conversational Gallery' as a chat interface where the AI responses contain inline bento-grids of photos.
Use the provided image URLs as the user's 'Memories' for rendering the gallery, insights, and OCR search scenarios.
The UI should feel tactile and premium: apply 1px borders with white/10 opacity to separate dark cards from the dark background.
Do NOT use pure #000000. Use #050505 or #0A0A0A for the main background to prevent OLED smearing while keeping it luxurious.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
